mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PUSH_TOKENS (USER_ID, PLATFORM, TOKEN, IS_ACTIVE, LAST_SEEN_AT) VALUES (#{userId}, #{platform}, #{token}, #{isActive}, #{lastSeenAt})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT U.NAME AS STAFF_NAME, PT.ID AS PUSH_TOKEN_ID, WMM.USER_ID AS OWNER_USER_ID, PT.TOKEN FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM INNER JOIN WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WMM ON WM.WORKPLACE_ID = WMM.WORKPLACE_ID AND WMM.ROLE = 'OWNER' AND WMM.RECEIVE_ATTENDANCE_PUSH = 1 AND WMM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' INNER JOIN USERS U ON U.ID = WMM.USER_ID INNER JOIN PUSH_TOKENS PT ON PT.USER_ID = WMM.USER_ID AND PT.IS_ACTIVE = 1 WHERE WM.WORKPLACE_ID = #{workplaceId} AND WM.USER_ID = #{userId} AND WM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
